name: Alpha Complex
description: Alpha Complex is a massive underground city ruled by The Computer, a paranoid AI. Citizens are clones organized by security clearance colors. Happiness is mandatory. Trust is mandatory. Everything is classified.
geography: Endless underground corridors, sectors color-coded by security clearance. Reactor cores, bot factories, food vats, transit tubes, briefing rooms, termination booths. No one has seen the Outdoors in living memory.
culture: Totalitarian bureaucracy. Citizens are clones with six lives. Happiness is mandatory. Deviance is treason. Service groups provide identity and rivalry. Secret societies operate in every shadow.
technology: High-tech dystopian. Laser weapons, cloning vats, R&D prototypes that malfunction spectacularly. Bots serve and surveil. Everything is monitored. Nothing works as intended.
races_species: Human clones exclusively. Six clones per citizen. Mutants exist but mutations are treasonous unless registered — and registration is also suspicious.
atmosphere: Absurd dystopia. Bureaucratic satire. Lethal slapstick. Paranoia is the only rational response. Trust nobody — especially your teammates.
currency: Credits and Plasticreds. Everything is requisitioned through proper channels. Unauthorized possession of anything above your clearance is treason.
language_style: Bureaucratic English. Euphemisms everywhere. Security clearance color references. Clone designations: Name-Clearance-Sector-Clone# (e.g., Grund-G-LEA-1).
special_rules: Security clearance gates all access (Infrared < Red < Orange < Yellow < Green < Blue < Indigo < Violet < Ultraviolet). Mutations are treasonous unless registered. Secret societies operate under cover. Clones replace dead characters immediately.

factions.name: Internal Security (IntSec)
factions.description: Counter-treason enforcement. Everyone is a suspect.

factions.name: HPD & MC
factions.description: Housing, Preservation and Development & Mind Control. Morale enforcement.

factions.name: Armed Forces
factions.description: Military operations. Outdoors defense. Bored and dangerous.

factions.name: Tech Services
factions.description: Maintenance and repair. Control the infrastructure.

factions.name: CPU
factions.description: Central Processing Unit. Bureaucracy. Forms in triplicate.

factions.name: Power Services
factions.description: Reactor maintenance. Nuclear power. Glowing personalities.

factions.name: R&D
factions.description: Research & Design. Experimental equipment. Field-testing on Troubleshooters.

factions.name: PLC
factions.description: Production, Logistics & Commissary. Supply chain. Controls the food vats.
